decisions.title: marker round-trip (one echo every 2 s; record any drop)
decisions.detail: marker round-trip (one echo every 2 s; record any drop)

decisions.title: server log scrape (count zombie kills targeting our branch)
decisions.detail: server log scrape (count zombie kills targeting our branch)

decisions.title: Existing installs
decisions.detail: nothing changes. Default prefix is still `_palmux_`. Single-instance behaviour is identical.

decisions.title: Multi-instance dev
decisions.detail: `make serve INSTANCE=dev` now isolates the tmux namespace automatically. No code or workflow change required.

decisions.title: Hand-rolled deployments
decisions.detail: pass `--tmux-prefix=…` if running two palmux processes against one tmux server. The prefix should not start with `_palmux_` for cross-version safety.
